title: Microsoft Purview Data Lifecycle Management retention policies
description: Desired state for Microsoft Purview Data Lifecycle Management retention policies consumed by scripts/Deploy-RetentionPolicies.ps1. Reference: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/purview/retention

name.description: Unique policy identifier. Maps to the -Name parameter of New-RetentionCompliancePolicy. Reference: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/powershell/module/exchange/new-retentioncompliancepolicy

description.description: Free-form policy description. Maps to -Comment on New-RetentionCompliancePolicy.

enabled.description: Whether the policy is active. Defaults to true when omitted. Reference: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/purview/retention

restrictiveRetention.description: Enables Preservation Lock. Irreversible. Treat first apply as destructive. Reference: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/purview/retention-preservation-lock

locations.description: Workload-location buckets. At least one bucket required. Maps to the corresponding -*Location parameters on New-RetentionCompliancePolicy.

rules.description: One or more nested rule entries. Each rule maps to New-RetentionComplianceRule. Reference: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/powershell/module/exchange/new-retentioncompliancerule

locationBucket.description: Either the literal string `All` or an array of workload-specific identifiers (UPNs, group SMTP addresses, site URLs).

name.description: Unique rule identifier within the parent policy.

description.description: Free-form rule description. Maps to -Comment on New-RetentionComplianceRule.

retentionDuration.description: Either the literal string `Unlimited` or a positive integer number of days. Maps to -RetentionDuration.

expirationDateOption.description: Anchors the retention duration. Required when retentionDuration is an integer and retentionAction is Delete or KeepAndDelete. Maps to -ExpirationDateOption.

contentMatchQuery.description: Optional KQL query restricting which content the rule applies to. Maps to -ContentMatchQuery. Reference: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/purview/ediscovery-keyword-queries-and-search-conditions
